preconditions.server: Canary built from the tested commit with the verified map and companion XML loaded
preconditions.character: fresh non-GM character with all eight TheBeginningQuest storages unset
instrumentation: capture storage values after every step
capture position, level, inventory and quest log
capture server errors and Lua warnings
record duplicate tutorial messages and map marks

tests.name: Opening route and Santiago introduction
steps: Cross AIDs 50058 through 50062 in route order.
Verify TutorialHintsStorage advances monotonically 1 through 5.
Verify map marks and tutorial windows fire once.
Greet Santiago and accept the first task.
assertions: No repeated hint after recrossing completed AIDs

tests.name: Santiago coat and cellar equipment
steps: Use chest UID 50080.
Verify coat 3562 is awarded and chest becomes empty for the character.
Equip the coat and continue Santiago dialogue.
Receive weapon 3270 and enter the cellar.
Use chest UID 50082 and verify torch 2920.

tests.name: Cellar navigation and cockroach legs
steps: Use sewer grate 435 and ladder 1948 in both directions.
Kill and loot at least three tutorial cockroaches.
Return to Santiago with three item 7882 legs.
Complete the health/fish dialogue through the normal path.
assertions: Three legs are removed exactly once
The player cannot become trapped in the cellar

tests.name: Santiago alternate easy branch persistence
steps: Repeat the fish lesson until the 'easy' response is available.
Use the alternate easy keyword branch.
Close dialogue or reconnect before answering the Zirella question.
Greet Santiago again.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: Persistent storage remains 11 although the in-memory dialogue moved to the Zirella question.
tests.acceptanceAfterFix: The resumed greeting matches the persisted Zirella stage and no fish reward can repeat.

tests.name: Paired Santiago route gates
steps: Attempt AIDs 50070/50071/50072/50074 before Santiago prerequisites.
Cross 50071 then 50074 after Santiago completion.
Attempt reverse traversal and repeat after reconnect.
assertions: Early access is denied with the intended message
Storage 13 character can follow the intended eastbound route
The paired-pass state cannot trap the player or survive incorrectly across sessions

tests.name: Zirella dead-tree and cart chain
steps: Advance Zirella dialogue to greet/log stage 6.
Use dead tree item 7753 and verify branch 7772 creation.
Push or carry the branch to Zirella's cart 7751.
Use the branch with the cart.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: No active handler creates or delivers the branch, so stages 7/7 are unreachable.
acceptanceAfterFix: Only eligible stage-6 characters can create the quest branch
Branch delivery consumes the correct branch
Wrong targets and retries do not advance state

tests.name: Zirella reward door and shovel
steps: Try door UID 50085 before Zirella completion.
Complete Zirella and try the door again.
Use chest UID 50093 and obtain shovel 3457.
Cross AIDs 50077/50078.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: Door has no quest-specific UID handler and the chest's tutorial 10 mapping points at stale UID 50084.
acceptanceAfterFix: Door denies stage<8 and opens at stage>=8
Tutorial mapping fires once for UID50093
AID50078 allows a character carrying the shovel

tests.name: Shovel cave and rope exit
steps: Use shovel 3457 on loose stone pile 7749.
Enter the temporary hole before it reverts.
Use chest UID 50094 and obtain rope 3003.
Cross AIDs 50079 and 50081.
Use rope on target 7762 and return to the surface.
assertions: Rope exit works and player is not trapped
Tutorial 11 maps to UID50094 after correction
Rope success message does not repeat indefinitely after terminal hint persistence

tests.name: Carlos intended food and trade flow
steps: Greet Carlos and complete the outfit introduction without using bypass keywords.
Accept the food task.
Acquire meat 3577 or ham 3582.
Return, request trade and sell exactly one valid food item.
Say ready.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: A valid sale does not move the persistent NPC state to the ready/completion stage.
acceptanceAfterFix: CarlosNpcTradeStorage is enabled only at the trade step and finalized after sale
Unrelated sales do not complete the quest

tests.name: Carlos outfit keyword bypass regression
steps: On the initial Carlos dialogue state, say outfit.
Inspect all Carlos storages and quest log.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: Current code writes final states 7/8 and skips the food/trade chain.
tests.acceptanceAfterFix: Outfit keyword only advances the intended outfit tutorial stage and cannot complete the quest.

tests.name: Rookgaard border terminal transition
steps: Approach AID50999 border tiles before CarlosQuestLog=7.
Attempt passage and verify denial or safe guidance.
Complete Carlos to stage 7 and cross AID50999.
Reconnect on both sides of the border.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: No active handler consumes AID50999 or sets CarlosQuestLog=8.
acceptanceAfterFix: Premature passage follows the intended world rule
Rookgaard town/citizenship is assigned only if verified as current design

tests.name: Skip tutorial contract
steps: Say skip tutorial to Santiago on a fresh character.
Inspect position, town, inventory, experience and all quest storages.
tests.expectedCurrentFailure: Santiago has no active skip-tutorial keyword despite the feature being advertised.
tests.acceptanceAfterFix: Behavior matches a separately approved skip contract and cannot duplicate normal rewards.

tests.name: Advanced-character and replay safety
steps: Set each quest storage to completed values and traverse the full tutorial route in both directions.
Repeat with partially advanced combinations representing disconnects between every stage.
Repeat all reward chest and action interactions.
assertions: No branch/cart/door action can regress or skip unrelated missions

exitCriteria: All blocking tests pass on a fresh character.
All negative and reconnect cases pass.
No Lua errors or unresolved quest identifiers remain for the implemented dependencies.
AID50999 becomes runtime-handled only after its focused gameplay PR is merged.
The final quest log reaches mission 3 state 8 without using the Carlos outfit bypass.
